subject: chemistry
title: 21N.1.HL.TZ0.21
question_html:
The rate equation for a reaction is:

rate = k[A][B]

Which mechanism is consistent with this rate equation?


A.  2A ⇌ I       Fast
     I + B → P    Slow

B.  A + B ⇌ I   Fast
     I + A → P    Slow

C.  A → I          Slow
     I + B → P    Fast

D.  B ⇌ I         Fast
     I + A → P    Slow
